name: Cyber Check Multiservices
description_short: Cyber Check Multiservices offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services in Whitehall, OH with extended hours until 9 PM weekdays.
description_long:
Cyber Check Multiservices is a financial services provider located at 190 S Hamilton Rd in Whitehall, Ohio. The company operates as a check-cashing and multiservices financial institution, serving the local community with a range of cash-access and payment solutions. Based on available information, they position themselves as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for customers needing immediate financial transactions.

The company offers check cashing as their primary service, along with money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options. These services are designed to provide customers with quick access to cash and payment processing without requiring a traditional bank account. The multiservices aspect of their business indicates they handle multiple types of financial transactions beyond basic check cashing.

Cyber Check Multiservices distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 9 PM on weekdays (Monday-Saturday) and until 6 PM on Sundays. This accessibility makes them convenient for working customers who may not have access during standard banking hours. Their physical location in Whitehall provides local access for the central Ohio community.

Prospective customers should note that detailed information about specific fees, service limits, and terms is not available from the current web presence. Check-cashing services typically carry per-transaction fees that should be compared with banking alternatives. For consumers without bank accounts or those needing immediate cash access, this service fills a practical niche, though fees and terms should be verified directly with the company.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 9 PM (Monday-Saturday), accommodating working customers
Sunday hours available (9 AM-6 PM) for weekend service access
Multiservice offering includes check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment
Local physical location in Whitehall, Ohio for in-person transactions
Phone contact available at (614) 762-7936 for customer inquiries
Website presence at cybercheckcashing.com for additional information
cons: Check-cashing services typically charge per-transaction fees that reduce net proceeds
No information provided about fee structure, limits, or terms on current web presence
Limited to a single physical location in Whitehall, restricting geographic accessibility
No online account management or remote check deposit options mentioned
No transparency visible regarding APRs or loan products if offered
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing immediate check cashing services
Working professionals requiring after-hours financial transactions and money transfer services
Consumers in the Whitehall area needing convenient local check cashing and bill payment
diagnosis: Cyber Check Multiservices is best for unbanked consumers and working professionals in the Whitehall area who need convenient after-hours check cashing and money transfer services. The primary caveat is that specific fee structures and service terms are not publicly available online, so customers should contact them directly to understand costs before using their services.
